reference: It may be cellulitis of the eyelid or an allergic reaction. Warm compresses are contraindicated. An ointment with antibiotics and steroids may be helpful, and you must see your pediatrician.
text: It may be cellulitis of the eyelid or an allergic reaction. Warm compresses are contraindicated; an ointment with antibiotics and steroids may be helpful, and you must see your pediatrician.
